rules.rule: All using directives must appear at the top of the file, outside any namespace declaration.
Directives must be ordered in three groups: (1) System.*, (2) third-party, (3) internal/project. Groups separated by exactly one blank line.
Groups must be separated by exactly one blank line — no more, no less.
Directives within each group must be sorted alphabetically (case-insensitive, ascending).
Each using directive must appear on its own line.
Unused using directives must be removed before committing.
using directives must not appear inside a namespace block.
using aliases must only be used to resolve genuine ambiguities, never for brevity alone.
using static directives must not be used unless The Standard explicitly permits them.
